search.query: `windowsindex` host="$Server$" `windowssourcetype` EventCode="4616" | table _time host Account_Name Account_Domain Name Previous_Time New_Time | rename _time AS Time host AS Server Account_Name AS "Time Changed By" Account_Domain AS Domain Name AS "Time Changed By Process" Previous_Time AS "Previous Time" New_Time AS "New Time" | convert timeformat="%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y." ctime(Time)
